name: Winter Melon Soup, Simplified (Doong Gwah Ton)
recipeIngredient: 6 Fresh water chestnuts, peeled and sliced
1/2 tsp Chicken base (or 1/2 chicken bouillon cube)
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
MARINADE:
- 1 teaspoon Salt
- 1/2 teaspoon Sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon Thin soy sauce
- 1 teaspoon Cornstarch
1. Remove the meat from the chicken thighs; save the bones for soup. Dice the chicken into small cubes (approximately 1/2").
2. Sprinkle chicken with each of the ingredients listed under "marinade," mix well and marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Remove skin and dice melon into 1-inch cubes.
4. Measure the water into a large pot, add the chicken bones and bring to a boil. Cook for 25 minutes.
5. Remove bones from the pot, add the chicken and diced winter melon, cover and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
6. Add diced water chestnuts, sliced mushrooms, and chicken base or bouillon cube.
7. Bring to a boil and serve.
SOURCE: Chopsticks, Clever and Wok.
